title: becium grandiflorum var. punctatum
intro: Becium grandiflorum var. punctatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the African blue basil or Lamiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and providing relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Becium grandiflorum var. punctatum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for consumption and topical use.
